summary: In his most recent video, Taiki explicitly states 'The Bottom Is In' and predicts Bitcoin prices will move higher.
narrative: After spending months profitably shorting Ethereum through late 2025, Taiki's narrative has shifted significantly in his latest update to calling a market bottom. He now argues that specific market mechanisms will propel BTC to higher prices, advising viewers to ignore bearish 4-Year Cycle theories and prepare for an uptrend.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
